style.name: Swiss Style newsroom grid
style.zhName: 瑞士国际主义新闻栅格风
style.description: Strict modular grid, clean sans typography, red-blue-black accents, disciplined white space, fixed Xiazi and Doudoulong IP figures, high-end editorial poster system.

zh-CN.headlineFact: 法国西班牙会师四强，美伊重启谈判
zh-CN.headlineView: 世界在争夺冠军、航道、算力与安全感
zh-CN.headlineFull: 法国西班牙会师四强，美伊重启谈判；世界在争夺冠军、航道、算力与安全感。
zh-CN.intro: 过去24小时，法国和西班牙晋级世界杯四强；美伊同意继续谈判，但停火已被宣布结束。台风巴威压向东亚，西班牙山火造成重大伤亡。科技与市场线上，SpaceX地面算力、腾讯洽谈Manus、SK海力士美股首秀和日本通胀，共同指向资源重新定价。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 今天的主线不是热闹，而是稀缺：冠军、航道、算力、气候安全和物价稳定都在被重新竞价。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 足球抢四强，企业抢算力，天气抢头条，钱包负责最后买单。

en-US.headlineFact: France and Spain reach the semis as diplomacy, weather and AI capital reshape the day
en-US.headlineView: the world is bidding for trophies, routes, compute and security
en-US.headlineFull: France and Spain reach the semis as diplomacy, weather and AI capital reshape the day; the world is bidding for trophies, routes, compute and security.
en-US.intro: France and Spain reached the World Cup semifinals. The U.S. and Iran agreed to continue talks, though the previous ceasefire was declared over. Typhoon Bavi threatened East Asia, a Spanish wildfire caused heavy casualties, and AI infrastructure, Tencent-Manus talks, SK Hynix and Japan inflation all pointed to repriced scarcity.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The day is about scarcity: trophies, shipping lanes, compute, climate safety and price stability are all being repriced.
en-US.doudouQuote: Football chases semifinals, companies chase compute, weather grabs the headline, and wallets get the bill.

sources.title: ChatGPT hotspot draft verified against live web sources

zh-CN.headlineFact: 法国2:0摩洛哥，西班牙2:1比利时
zh-CN.headlineView: 淘汰赛奖励能在最难十分钟解决问题的人
zh-CN.headlineFull: 法国2:0摩洛哥，西班牙2:1比利时；淘汰赛奖励能在最难十分钟解决问题的人。
zh-CN.intro: 北京时间7月10日05:00至7月11日05:00，世界杯四分之一决赛产生两场结果：法国2:0击败摩洛哥，西班牙2:1击败比利时。法国与西班牙将在半决赛相遇，比赛主线从个人球星转向球队在压力下的纠错能力。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 顶级球队不是不犯错，而是犯错后还能把比赛拉回自己的节奏。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 第88分钟才交答案，这叫压轴，不叫拖延。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：世界杯日报。

en-US.headlineFact: France beat Morocco 2-0, Spain beat Belgium 2-1
en-US.headlineView: knockout football rewards teams that solve the hardest minutes
en-US.headlineFull: France beat Morocco 2-0, Spain beat Belgium 2-1; knockout football rewards teams that solve the hardest minutes.
en-US.intro: During the Beijing-time reporting window, France beat Morocco 2-0 and Spain defeated Belgium 2-1 in World Cup quarterfinals. France and Spain will meet in the semifinals, shifting the storyline from star power to how teams recover under pressure.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Elite teams are not error-free; they pull the match back into their rhythm after the error.
en-US.doudouQuote: Submitting the answer in minute 88 is a finale, not procrastination.

sources.title: Spain v Belgium: World Cup 2026 quarter-final - live

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美伊同意继续谈判，停火却已结束
zh-CN.headlineView: 谈判桌还在，安全感已经先离场
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美伊同意继续谈判，停火却已结束；谈判桌还在，安全感已经先离场。
zh-CN.intro: 美国同意伊朗继续谈判的请求，但特朗普同时称此前停火已经结束。此前油轮遇袭与双方军事打击使霍尔木兹海峡通行承压，卡塔尔调解人员也赴伊朗推动降温。周五未报告新袭击，但新停火安排仍未成形。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 当谈判和打击同时存在，外交首先要做的是防止误判，而不是立刻解决所有矛盾。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 一边说继续谈，一边说停火结束，这桌外交打得像乒乓球。

en-US.headlineFact: The U.S. and Iran agree to keep talking, but the ceasefire is over
en-US.headlineView: the table remains, but confidence has left first
en-US.headlineFull: The U.S. and Iran agree to keep talking, but the ceasefire is over; the table remains, but confidence has left first.
en-US.intro: The U.S. agreed to Iran's request to continue negotiations, while Trump said the previous ceasefire was no longer in effect. Tanker attacks and reciprocal strikes strained the Strait of Hormuz, and Qatari mediators moved to revive diplomacy. No new Friday attacks were reported, but a replacement ceasefire remains unclear.
en-US.xiaziQuote: When talks and strikes coexist, diplomacy first has to prevent miscalculation.
en-US.doudouQuote: They are talking and ending the ceasefire at the same time; the table sounds like ping-pong.

sources.title: Iran wants talks but ceasefire over, says Trump

zh-CN.headlineFact: 台风巴威逼近台湾、日本与中国东部
zh-CN.headlineView: 风暴还没登陆，城市系统已开始考试
zh-CN.headlineFull: 台风巴威逼近台湾、日本与中国东部；风暴还没登陆，城市系统已开始考试。
zh-CN.intro: 台风巴威逼近东亚，多地提前停课、取消航班、渔船回港并部署救援力量。AP称台湾北部和中国东部沿海面临强风暴雨，浙江已疏散人员，福建暂停渡运。此前菲律宾强降雨与山体滑坡已造成伤亡。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 极端天气考验的不只是预报，而是预警之后城市和家庭能否立刻执行。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 这次别和风讲道理，门窗、船和行程都先听预警。

en-US.headlineFact: Typhoon Bavi approaches Taiwan, Japan and eastern China
en-US.headlineView: the storm has not landed, but systems are already being tested
en-US.headlineFull: Typhoon Bavi approaches Taiwan, Japan and eastern China; the storm has not landed, but systems are already being tested.
en-US.intro: Typhoon Bavi pushed toward East Asia, prompting school closures, flight cancellations, returning fishing boats and emergency deployments. AP reported risks for northern Taiwan and China's east coast, with evacuations in Zhejiang and ferry suspensions in Fujian after deadly regional rain impacts.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Extreme weather tests not just forecasts, but whether cities and families act after warnings.
en-US.doudouQuote: Do not debate the wind; windows, boats and schedules should listen first.

sources.title: Typhoon Bavi takes aim at China as Taiwan's capital shuts schools

zh-CN.headlineFact: 西班牙南部山火致12死23失踪
zh-CN.headlineView: 危险不是火看得见，而是它跑得比指令更快
zh-CN.headlineFull: 西班牙南部山火致12死23失踪；危险不是火看得见，而是它跑得比指令更快。
zh-CN.intro: 西班牙阿尔梅里亚省山火已造成至少12人死亡、23人失踪。AP和卫报报道称，火势在高温和大风中快速穿过干燥山区，部分遇难者在撤离途中被困。灾害也暴露出极端高温下应急指令执行的重要性。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 山火应对不是胆量测试，而是统一指令、通信和撤离路线的系统工程。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 跑得快不一定跑得过风向，听指令有时就是保命技能。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：西班牙山火。

en-US.headlineFact: Southern Spain wildfire kills 12 and leaves 23 missing
en-US.headlineView: the danger is not visible flame, but speed faster than orders
en-US.headlineFull: Southern Spain wildfire kills 12 and leaves 23 missing; the danger is not visible flame, but speed faster than orders.
en-US.intro: A wildfire in Almeria, Spain, killed at least 12 people and left 23 missing. AP and The Guardian reported fast spread through dry terrain under heat and wind, with some victims trapped while fleeing. The disaster underlines emergency discipline under extreme heat.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Wildfire response is not a bravery test; it is a system of commands, communications and routes.
en-US.doudouQuote: Fast legs may not outrun shifting wind; following orders can be survival.

sources.title: Wildfire devastates an expat community in southern Spain, killing at least 12 with 23 missing

zh-CN.headlineFact: SpaceX的AI收入短期仍靠地面算力
zh-CN.headlineView: 星辰大海负责估值，地面机房负责现金流
zh-CN.headlineFull: SpaceX的AI收入短期仍靠地面算力；星辰大海负责估值，地面机房负责现金流。
zh-CN.intro: 市场分析称，SpaceX近期AI故事并不主要来自轨道数据中心，而是地面Colossus算力协议。Finimize称相关协议年收入预期可能超过280亿美元，轨道计算仍更像下一阶段想象，现金流先由地面数据中心承担。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 宏大愿景要靠现实业务供血，先赚钱的往往不是最浪漫的那一段。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 火箭仰望星空，账单先在服务器机房里结。

en-US.headlineFact: SpaceX's near-term AI story is ground compute, not orbital data centers
en-US.headlineView: space sells the dream, data centers pay the bills
en-US.headlineFull: SpaceX's near-term AI story is ground compute, not orbital data centers; space sells the dream, data centers pay the bills.
en-US.intro: Market analysis says SpaceX's near-term AI story is less about orbital data centers and more about Colossus ground-compute deals. Finimize cited expectations that these deals could top $28 billion a year, while orbital compute remains a next-decade bet.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Grand visions need cashflow; the first business to pay is often not the most romantic one.
en-US.doudouQuote: Rockets look at the stars; the invoice lands in the server room.

sources.title: SpaceX’s AI Story Starts With Data Centers, Not Space

zh-CN.headlineFact: 腾讯洽谈成为Manus最大股东
zh-CN.headlineView: AI代理争夺进入资本、数据与监管重排
zh-CN.headlineFull: 腾讯洽谈成为Manus最大股东；AI代理争夺进入资本、数据与监管重排。
zh-CN.intro: 路透援引知情人士称，腾讯正洽谈成为AI代理公司Manus最大股东，背景是北京要求Meta撤销约20亿美元收购。交易尚未最终落地，但它说明AI代理不只是产品竞赛，也牵动数据流向、控制权和监管许可。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: AI大交易买的不只是模型，还包括数据、入口、牌照和谁能继续控制系统。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: AI代理还没完全学会自动办事，大股东名单先自动刷新了。

en-US.headlineFact: Tencent is in talks to become Manus' largest shareholder
en-US.headlineView: AI-agent competition is now capital, data and regulatory reshuffling
en-US.headlineFull: Tencent is in talks to become Manus' largest shareholder; AI-agent competition is now capital, data and regulatory reshuffling.
en-US.intro: Reuters reported that Tencent is in talks to become the largest shareholder in AI-agent company Manus after Beijing ordered Meta to unwind a roughly $2 billion acquisition. The deal is not final, but it shows agentic AI is about data flows, control and regulatory permission as much as products.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Big AI deals buy more than models: data, access, licences and control.
en-US.doudouQuote: The agents are still learning tasks; the shareholder list already auto-refreshes.

sources.title: Tencent in talks to become AI startup Manus’ largest shareholder, sources say

zh-CN.headlineFact: SK海力士美股首秀上涨约13%
zh-CN.headlineView: 资本追逐AI内存，也要系好估值安全带
zh-CN.headlineFull: SK海力士美股首秀上涨约13%；资本追逐AI内存，也要系好估值安全带。
zh-CN.intro: SK海力士美国存托凭证在纳斯达克首日上涨约13%，此前以每份149美元定价并募资约265亿美元。AP称这是外资公司在美国最大规模IPO之一，背后是AI高带宽内存需求持续升温。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: AI内存从半导体配角变成算力军备竞赛核心，但好行业不等于任何价格都合理。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 首日上涨很热闹，周期拐弯从来不会提前发短信。

en-US.headlineFact: SK Hynix rises about 13% in its U.S. trading debut
en-US.headlineView: capital loves AI memory, but valuations still need a seatbelt
en-US.headlineFull: SK Hynix rises about 13% in its U.S. trading debut; capital loves AI memory, but valuations still need a seatbelt.
en-US.intro: SK Hynix ADRs rose about 13% in their Nasdaq debut after pricing at $149 and raising about $26.5 billion. AP said it was one of the largest U.S. offerings by a foreign company, powered by demand for high-bandwidth memory in AI systems.
en-US.xiaziQuote: AI memory has moved from supporting cast to core asset, but a good sector is not any-price-safe.
en-US.doudouQuote: The debut is loud; the memory cycle does not text before turning.

sources.title: SK Hynix rises 13% in debut on Wall Street as demand for memory chips soars amid AI frenzy

zh-CN.headlineView: 远方冲突和弱日元，最后都会写进身边账单
zh-CN.headlineFull: 日本批发通胀升至7.1%；远方冲突和弱日元，最后都会写进身边账单。
zh-CN.intro: 日本6月企业商品价格指数同比上涨7.1%，高于预期并创2023年3月以来最快增速。能源、燃料和金属成本上升，加上日元走弱，使企业成本压力可能继续向消费价格传导，也让日本央行加息讨论升温。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 进口型经济体的物价账单，往往把汇率、能源和地缘风险写在同一行。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 工资追物价像赶地铁，弱日元还在背后推了一把。

en-US.headlineView: distant conflict and a weak yen end up on local bills
en-US.headlineFull: Japan's wholesale inflation accelerates to 7.1%; distant conflict and a weak yen end up on local bills.
en-US.intro: Japan's producer prices rose 7.1% year on year in June, above forecasts and the fastest since March 2023. Higher energy, fuel and metals costs, along with a weaker yen, may keep passing through to consumer prices and intensify BOJ rate-hike debate.
en-US.xiaziQuote: For import-dependent economies, currency, energy and geopolitics meet on the same bill.
en-US.doudouQuote: Wages are chasing the train while the weak yen gives inflation a shove.

sources.title: Japan’s Wholesale Inflation Picks Up Speed As Costs Hit Home
